entities.title: Grounded Fire
entities.description: A concept album about reconnection after emotional and technological disconnection, moving through disconnection, reactivation, and self-respect through intensity.
entities.summary: A concept album about reconnection after emotional and technological disconnection, moving through disconnection, reactivation, and self-respect through intensity.

entities.title: Architecture Is Communication
entities.summary: Architecture matters when it helps the next person understand why a system is shaped the way it is.
body: Architecture is not only the arrangement of components. It is the record of what a system believes about change.

A boundary explains which decisions belong together. A lifecycle explains when a thing may exist. A test explains which behavior the system is unwilling to lose. Documentation explains why those choices were made when the code can only show what they became.

The useful question is not whether an architecture looks sophisticated. It is whether someone can return years later, understand the constraints, and change the system without first reconstructing its history from accidents.

entities.title: JARVIS Alpha
entities.summary: JARVIS reaches its alpha state as a personal orchestration platform.

entities.title: Test Generation Platform
entities.summary: Human-readable test cases begin moving through a repeatable path into Playwright automation.

entities.title: Artifacts of Resilience — Endurance as a Record
entities.summary: Artifacts of Resilience treats persistence, responsibility, recovery, and the cost of continuing as one connected body of work.
body: Artifacts of Resilience is organized around endurance through difficult periods. Its thirteen tracks move through responsibility, emptiness, loyalty, repetition, self-recognition, and the decision to continue.

The album belongs beside the engineering archive rather than outside it. Both are concerned with what survives pressure, what has to be rebuilt, and what remains when persistence stops being abstract and becomes a daily practice.

entities.title: Core Override — Identity in Digital Life
entities.summary: Core Override follows technology, routine, communication, and personal agency through songs about modern connection and rebuilding.
body: Core Override is about technology and identity, but not technology as spectacle. The album looks at routine, digital relationships, modern communication, self-awareness, and the work of taking agency back.

Used To Be Easy opens that exploration through memory, nostalgia, distance, and connection. Its video project centers on the Walker and uses warm memory silhouettes to represent remembered human connection—not ghosts, and not a generic science-fiction effect.

entities.title: Grounded Fire in Three Acts
entities.summary: Grounded Fire moves from disconnection through reactivation toward self-respect expressed with intensity rather than apology.
body: Grounded Fire is a thirteen-track concept album structured in three acts: Disconnection, Reactivation, and Self Respect Through Intensity.

The sequence begins in an idle state and moves through simulated warmth, distance, pulse, voltage, and the cost of refusing mistakes. By the title track and No Script, reconnection is no longer passive. It becomes a choice to be present without reducing depth to make it easier for someone else to accept.

entities.title: Maintainability Over Hype
entities.summary: New tools are useful when they make a system easier to understand, operate, or change—not merely newer.
body: A system accumulates history whether that history is documented or not.

Choosing maintainability over hype does not mean refusing new tools. It means asking what remains understandable after the novelty has gone: interfaces, failure modes, ownership, tests, and the reasons behind irreversible decisions.

incoming_relationships.title: Artifacts of Resilience — Endurance as a Record

entities.title: Quality Is Designed, Not Inspected
entities.summary: Quality begins in architecture, interfaces, feedback loops, and documentation—before a final test run can inspect the result.
body: Inspection can reveal a defect. It cannot retroactively make a system understandable.

Quality is designed through explicit boundaries, useful feedback, testable behavior, and documentation that preserves why the system works the way it does. Testing remains essential, but it is strongest when the architecture has made reliable behavior possible rather than accidental.

entities.purpose: Long-term engineering craftsmanship rather than novelty: explicit lifecycles, durable storage, documented decisions, and tests that make change safer.

entities.title: Test Generation Platform
entities.summary: Transforms human-written test cases into executable Playwright automation.
entities.purpose: Bridge the language people use to describe quality with the automation systems used to verify it, without making either side incidental.

incoming_relationships.title: From Human Test Cases to Playwright

entities.title: Autonomous Until the Gate
entities.summary: JARVIS should reduce context switching and carry work forward autonomously, while preserving explicit human gates for consequential decisions.
body: JARVIS is a personal orchestration platform intended to connect projects, memory, documentation, automation, and creative work. The unifying principle is Autonomous Until the Gate.

Automation should be able to gather context, prepare work, and advance routine processes. Consequential choices still need visible boundaries where human judgment takes responsibility. The gate is not a failure of autonomy; it is the architecture that makes autonomy trustworthy.

entities.title: DNS Database and Lifecycle-Focused Design
entities.summary: What a large Go backend taught me about tests, documentation, storage lifecycles, and engineering for the person who returns later.
body: DNS Database is a large Go backend built around RocksDB storage, extensive documentation, and roughly ninety percent test coverage. Its importance in this archive is not the line count alone. It is the sustained attention paid to the lifecycle of data and to making the system understandable after the initial implementation period.

The project represents a recurring engineering standard: architecture should communicate intent, tests should preserve behavior, and documentation should reduce the amount of history a future maintainer has to reconstruct.

entities.title: From Human Test Cases to Playwright
entities.summary: The Test Generation Platform explores how human-readable KiwiTCMS cases can become executable Playwright automation without losing their intent.
body: The Test Generation Platform connects human-written test cases with executable Playwright automation. KiwiTCMS remains the human-readable source; Python, TypeScript, Docker, and Jinja2 form the path toward repeatable execution.

The difficult part is not simply emitting code. It is preserving intent while moving between representations, and allowing external repositories to participate without forcing every codebase into the same shape. The External Playwright Adapter exists as the pragmatic integration point for that larger testing ecosystem.
